project_cards.business_domain: Security telemetry replay, release safety, and validation
project_cards.project_goal: Improve release confidence and replay fidelity for security event-processing and retrieval-adjacent services.
project_cards.scope_ceiling: Tooling and reliability work around existing services, replay sandboxes, CI gates, and device/parser validation; not ownership of the core product roadmap.
project_cards.ownership_ceiling: Implement parsers, replay fixtures, CI/CD gates, deployment automation, Linux validation harnesses, and bounded reliability fixes with teammate guidance.
project_cards.notes: Use for replay sandbox, release hardening, device-feed validation, or regression-gating variants without changing the underlying security-platform context.

project_cards.business_domain: Courier ETA, supply-demand planning, and anomaly monitoring
project_cards.project_goal: Improve city-level planning speed and operational visibility through reusable ETA and supply monitoring services.
project_cards.scope_ceiling: Internal feature services and planning workflows for ops teams, backed by ETL and event-driven updates; not a standalone customer-facing product.
project_cards.ownership_ceiling: Build feature pipelines, anomaly checks, service adapters, cached reads, and planning diagnostics with partner engineering teams.
project_cards.notes: Use for courier ETA feature service, capacity planning service, merchant supply exception monitoring, or outage diagnostics.

derived_jobs.title: Software Engineer II - AI Security & Governance
Software Development Engineer, Neuron Foundation Tools

project_cards.business_domain: Security knowledge retrieval and analyst tooling
project_cards.project_goal: Reduce manual context gathering for policy and incident investigations through retrieval-assisted internal tooling.
project_cards.scope_ceiling: Feature delivery inside a team-maintained retrieval assistant, evaluator, or analyst console; not end-to-end ownership of a standalone platform.
project_cards.ownership_ceiling: Implement handlers, evaluators, ingestion utilities, replay hooks, lightweight UI surfaces, and deployment checks for a bounded intern-owned slice.
project_cards.notes: Use for retrieval assistant, policy search, evaluation, or analyst-console variants. The business logic stays anchored in security knowledge retrieval.

project_cards.business_domain: Campaign launch tooling, experimentation, and promotion audits
project_cards.project_goal: Give operators a shared console to configure, launch, and audit promotion campaigns with fewer errors.
project_cards.scope_ceiling: Internal launch-console and experimentation workflows tied to existing backend services and data refresh jobs; not ownership of company-wide growth product strategy.
project_cards.ownership_ceiling: Build validation logic, console flows, sync jobs, audit tables, and release coordination with product/frontend/backend partners.
project_cards.notes: Use for campaign operations console, regional promotion console, or experiment-setup workflow variants.
